task.desc: Add *.egg-info and __pycache__/ to .gitignore to prevent Python build artifacts from being committed

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add .gitignore to prevent Python build artifacts from being committed","target_files":[".gitignore"],"patch_commands":["echo '.egg-info' >> .gitignore","echo '__pycache__' >> .gitignore"],"validation_commands":["grep -q 'egg-info' .gitignore && grep -q '__pycache__' .gitignore"],"expected_outcome":"Python build artifacts (.egg-info, __pycache__) are now excluded from commit","risk_notes":"Potential security risk if .egg-info is malicious; ensure it's not a legitimate package","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}

parsed.edit_description: Add .gitignore to prevent Python build artifacts from being committed
parsed.expected_outcome: Python build artifacts (.egg-info, __pycache__) are now excluded from commit
parsed.risk_notes: Potential security risk if .egg-info is malicious; ensure it's not a legitimate package
